mapper.select: /* 한전 요금 수익 조회 */ select bill_idx, site_id, bill_yearm, meter_read_day, plan_type, plan_name, contract_power, svc_sdate, svc_edate, base_rate, consume_rate, off_peak_rate, mid_peak_rate, max_peak_rate, pwr_factor_rate, tot_elec_rate, elec_fund, val_add_tax, tot_amt_bill, peak_pwr_demand, usg, off_peak_usg, mid_peak_usg, max_peak_usg, lead_pwr_factor, lag_pwr_factor, demand_chg_reduct, energy_chg_reduct, reg_date from tb_bill where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and bill_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } order by bill_yearm

select site_id, std_timestamp, sum(base_rate) as base_rate, sum(pwr_factor_rate) as pwr_factor_rate, sum(tot_elec_rate) as consume_rate, sum(elec_fund) as elec_fund, sum(val_add_tax) as val_add_tax, sum(tot_elec_rate) as tot_elec_rate, sum(tot_amt_bill) as tot_amt_bill from ( select usg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, usg_val as base_rate, usg_val+3400000 as pwr_factor_rate , usg_val+(3400000*2) as consume_rate, usg_val+(3400000*3) as elec_fund , usg_val+(3400000*4) as val_add_tax, usg_val+(3400000*5) as tot_elec_rate, usg_val+(3400000*6) as tot_amt_bill from tb_usage where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId }
and std_date between str_to_date('20180820000000','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') and str_to_date('20180820025959','%Y%m%d%H%i%s') ) a where 1=1 group by site_id, std_timestamp
